integration_constraints: Never create, modify, or delete any record in Salesforce

after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, state business hours, confirm if emergency. If emergency: collect name, number, address, attempt transfer to on-call. If transfer fails, assure 15-min callback. If non-emergency: collect details, confirm next-business-day followup.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, identify purpose, collect name and callback number, transfer to appropriate team during 08:00–18:00 America/New_York. If transfer fails, confirm 30-min callback.
